name_cn:
Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version
【Black Leather with Strap ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this bag is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
